description: Gigabit Ethernet PHY, RGMII interface, IEEE 1588 PTP
notes: MDIO/MDC clause-22 management interface (32 PHY addresses, 32 16-bit registers)
RGMII data interface to FPGA Ethernet MAC core
Hardware strap pins set initial PHY address and master/slave mode
PTP_PPS_OUT can return 1 PPS to FPGA for time-sync applications
